check_description: Category performance should include at least one reliable product category.
Friction scores should stay between 0 and 100 for dashboard interpretation.
Each funnel step should have less than or equal to the previous step count.
Funnel conversion and drop-off rates should stay within valid percentage bounds.
Estimated revenue leakage should never be negative.
Revenue leakage requires positive transaction count, revenue, and average order value.
Key funnel events should have valid session keys for session-level analysis.
stg_events should contain event-level GA4 data.
